title: Cossacks of the Kuban
actors: Sergei Lukyanov, Marina Ladynina, Aleksandr Khvylya
plot: In the steppes of the Kuban love is born on two collective farms while wheat is (enthusiastically) gathered. Galina, the energetic chairwoman of one of the two kolkhozes, vies with her male counterpart for the best harvest. At the...
